status: template; replace placeholders in target evidence storage

retention_mapping.encrypted_storage_lifecycle: same as source wallet record retention; encrypted payload and metadata only

ipfs_pinning.retain_while: source record version is active, retained for recovery, or under legal hold
ipfs_pinning.delete_action: remove wallet manifest references, revoke dependent key wraps, then unpin encrypted CIDs
ipfs_pinning.evidence: record CID list and unpin ticket without plaintext

filecoin_deal_expiration.renewal_rule: renew only active retained encrypted replicas
filecoin_deal_expiration.delete_action: block renewal or issue provider-supported removal for deleted or expired records

s3_lifecycle.current_object_expiration: delete when source record retention ends and legal hold is absent
s3_lifecycle.server_side_encryption: enabled as defense-in-depth; client-side wallet encryption remains authoritative

backup_purge.evidence: ciphertext object IDs and purge ticket IDs only

alert_retention.ops_health_jsonl: 90 days unless incident/legal hold requires longer
alert_retention.alert_router_payloads: 90 days unless incident/legal hold requires longer
alert_retention.payload_rule: status metadata only; no plaintext, proof witnesses, coordinates, tokens, or secret values

repair_validation.required_result: storage repair reports pass with failed_replica_count=0 and expose ciphertext hashes/statuses only
